human_verification.notes: Reviewed validated readiness for commercial and industrial construction punch-list lifecycle control, permit and inspection boundaries, completion evidence handling, functionality coverage, and specification-based runtime posture.

specialist_owned_evidence: Manifest enforces punch-list-specific lifecycle control for deficiency intake, corrective work, backcheck, and closeout-ready packaging with explicit refusal of permit approval, code interpretation, licensed trade signoff, and owner-acceptance claims.
Authoritative sources cover permitting, inspection, site safety, public punch-list workflow, work-order terminology, and closeout evidence rather than a single dimension.

review_notes: No functional or evidence blockers remain for this package draft.

All required scenario families and escalation families are represented, including incomplete inputs, rework exceptions, evidence-free completion requests, permit-readiness gaps, closeout blockers, and trade-authority refusal.

notes: validated conditions met for commercial and industrial construction punch-list specialist.
